## What does this PR do?

<!-- Briefly explain what you changed and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (broken test / selector update)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (new test / new country / new coverage)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (dependency update / config / docs)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally with zero failures
- [ ] No `.env` values, real URLs, or personal data in the code
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `master`
- [ ] Commit messages are descriptive (not "fixed stuff")
- [ ] If adding a new country/field: verified values against the real form
